title: Loot & Explore (More RPG Content)
description: Explore and loot new structures and fight new dangerous foes!
body:
![Desert Inn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GxOv67AE/images/eae070dd8fdbe47fd336b99f3623b44cc93ca062.png)
## Loot & Explore (BETA)💎🏘️

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Loot-N-Explore)

## 📂 Installation
### 🚨Required Mods
- [Structure Pool API](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-pool-api)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### 🤝Integrated Compatibility
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine) & [Spell Power Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power)
- [RPG Series](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)
- [More RPG Classes Series](https://modrinth.com/user/Fichte)


## 🕹️ Features
### 🏚️Structures
- Explore dangerous structures with new enemies, to fight against
- Find a Inn in a village or in the Overworld
- You´ll find usefull stuff there for your adventure if you trade with the Innkeeper 🍻



### 💀Monster

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1.0.0 Frozen Depths - Release Version

- Frosthaunt
- A frozen skeleton with a axe, that freezes you with each hit you can find it in Glacial Tombs.
![Frosthaunt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GxOv67AE/images/76ec6a3ffe059d1bcb25014d1cd0dc2a994c8253.png)


- Glaze
- Icy "Blaze" Variant, spawns a frosthail above you and spawns a freezing wind if you come to close, spawns in the Glaze Tower structure.
![Glaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GxOv67AE/images/6ceac9dc57ca66cad01234ef8357de822e788f8b.png)


- Frost Monarch (Boss)
- Can be spawned if you place the Monarchs Crown on the Frozen Souls Block in the Frost Monarch Temple Structure.
- The Monarchs Crown can be found in Glaze Tower & Glacial Tombs Loot Chests!
- Can summon his servants and perform a range screech attack. Immune to Fire, melee and arrow attacks are reduced. 
- He also has several freezing attacks & mechanics, stay warm during the fight!
![Frost Monarch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GxOv67AE/images/739232aa1b601e8606a4a795ad7f327ba00d6f36.png)

</details>

### ⚔️Equipment
- Special Weapons can be crafted with new Smithing Template Upgrades!
- You can find them in structure loot chests and the material for the upgrade can be dropped from existing and new Boss-Monsters.
- Each weapon type has their special ability & Passive spell (Only if Spell Engine is installed)
![Special Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GxOv67AE/images/328c3f80bf642f0cc0b114b7702c93824659b21f.png)
